pages.title: Mined materials
pages.text: The 15 raw materials that come directly from ore blocks (before any alloying):$(br2)$(item)Karmesine$(), $(item)Ovium$(), $(item)Jauxum$(), $(item)Duranite$(), $(item)Vibranium$(), $(item)Eezo$(), $(item)Basalt$(), $(item)Dilithium$(), $(item)Tiberium$(), $(item)Prometheum$(), $(item)Valyrium$(), $(item)Osram$(), $(item)Palladium$(), $(item)Aurorium$(), $(item)Abyssum$().

pages.title: Meteorite
pages.text: $(item)Meteorite$() is a 16th raw material, obtained only from mining $(l:soa_additions:nyx_guide/materials/meteor_rock)meteor rock$() — the same crater stone the Nyx mod generates. It bridges the two material systems.
